problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
